summary: The diff implements all three requirements for rebranding the donation site to True Hope Foundation. REQ-8 (landing page copy updates) is implemented in LandingPage.tsx with appropriate humanitarian messaging and True Hope Foundation branding. REQ-9 (hero banner image) is referenced correctly in the code pointing to hero-truehope.dim_1200x600.png. REQ-10 (campaign configuration) is fully implemented with a $250,000 goal in campaign.ts. No missing requirements or hallucinated features detected.
